## Summary

<!-- What is this change and why? Link to the plan week document if applicable. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `make validate` passes locally
- [ ] `terraform test` passes (or N/A if no tests present)
- [ ] Module READMEs regenerated (`make docs`)
- [ ] No real account IDs/ARNs in code, docs, or transcripts (use placeholder `123456789012`)
- [ ] Checkov skips (if any) have inline justifications (`#checkov:skip=CKV_XXX: <reason>`)
